_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

_contextSnippet: H&E staining of both the original cNF and derived organoids showed comparable cellular architecture; representative IHC for patient NF0002 showed similar staining pattern between parental cNF and organoids across S100, CD56, SOX2, toluidine blue, and CD34 markers
details: Organoids recapitulate the cellular architecture of parental cNF by H&E and IHC: S100+ Schwann cell network, CD34+ fibroblast lattice, SOX2+ dedifferentiated Schwann cells, CD56+ neuronal marker, toluidine blue+ mast cells all maintained; organoids form continuous cell networks (not discrete spheroids) growing exponentially over culture period; ECM composition preserved including collagen VI and matrisome gene expression
